violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Rice bin lid and knife observed stored between the faucet and the wall at the food prep sink. Equipment and utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location where they are not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
